title: nbdkit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.44.1-4]
- Fix v2v conversion failure when minimum_io_size > 64K
  resolves: RHEL-140707

[1.44.1-3]
- vddk export parameter should allow loose wildcards without FNM_PATHNAME
  resolves: RHEL-137303
full_text:
[1.44.1-4]
- Fix v2v conversion failure when minimum_io_size > 64K
  resolves: RHEL-140707

[1.44.1-3]
- vddk export parameter should allow loose wildcards without FNM_PATHNAME
  resolves: RHEL-137303

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1841.html
